new_classes.label_en: Other wine, other (subheading 2204 22 98) – non-PDO/PGI/Tokaj still wine in containers > 2 L and ≤ 10 L, n.e.s.
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Wein, anderer (Unterposition 2204 22 98) – Wein ohne g.U./g.g.A./Tokaj in Behältnissen > 2 L und ≤ 10 L, a.n.g.
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes (heading 2204) in containers holding more than 2 litres and up to and including 10 litres, which does not bear a Protected Designation of Origin (PDO), a Protected Geographical Indication (PGI), or the Tokaj designation, and which is not otherwise classified under subheadings 2204 22 10, 2204 22 26, 2204 22 38, 2204 22 33, 2204 22 79, or 2204 22 93; classified with reference to additional notes 4 and 5 to Chapter 22 regarding total dry extract.

coverage_explanation: The primary distinguishing criteria are captured: (1) wine of fresh grapes (heading 2204) – modelled via subClassOf WineOfFreshGrapes2204; (2) container size > 2 L and ≤ 10 L – modelled via someValuesFrom LargeContainer (≥ 2 L per TBox definition) and a decimalRange maxInclusive 10.0 on liquidVolumeInLitres; (3) absence of PDO/PGI quality – modelled via complement restrictions; (4) absence of Tokaj PDO quality – modelled via complement restriction; (5) not semi-sparkling – modelled via complement of SemiSparklingPressureQuality; (6) reference to additional notes 4 and 5 regarding total dry extract (including sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter and salts as non-volatile constituents) – partially captured via someValuesFrom NonVolatileDryExtractConstituentsQuality and TotalDryMatterContent. Gap: The specific numeric thresholds for total dry extract referenced in additional notes 4 and 5 (which discriminate sub-subheadings 22 to 98 within 2204 22 22–2204 22 98) are not fully axiomatised as datatype restrictions because the exact threshold values from the additional notes are not provided in the legal text excerpt. The 'other' / n.e.s. residual character of this code (catching what is not covered by 2204 22 10, 26, 33, 38, 79, 93) is expressed via complement restrictions on the major named qualities. The LargeContainer restriction captures ≥ 2 L but the upper bound of 10 L is expressed only via the liquidVolumeInLitres range restriction and not as a dedicated TBox class, since no MediumContainer class exists in the TBox.
